expected.agent_summary: Customer reports sending 5000 BDT via TXN-9101 to +8801719876543, which they now believe was the wrong recipient. Recipient is unresponsive.
expected.recommended_next_action: Verify TXN-9101 details with the customer and initiate the wrong-transfer dispute workflow per policy.
expected.customer_reply: We have noted your concern about transaction TXN-9101. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone. Our dispute team will review the case and contact you through official support channels.

actual.agent_summary: Customer claims to have sent 5000 taka to a wrong number around 2pm today.
actual.recommended_next_action: Gather more information about the intended recipient and the incorrect transaction.
actual.customer_reply: Please investigate the transaction and help me recover my money.

official_cases.label: Wrong transfer claim with inconsistent evidence

field_mismatches.rationale: Repeated past transfers to the same recipient contradict the wrong transfer claim. The service correctly identifies the relevant transaction (the most recent one of matching amount) but flags the inconsistency for human review rather than rubber-stamping the dispute.

Repeated past transfers to the same recipient contradict the wrong transfer claim. The service correctly identifies the relevant transaction (the most recent one of matching amount) but flags the inconsistency for human review rather than rubber-stamping the dispute.

expected.agent_summary: Customer claims TXN-9202 (2000 BDT to +8801812345678) was a wrong transfer, but transaction history shows three prior transfers to the same counterparty in the past nine days, suggesting an established recipient.
expected.recommended_next_action: Flag for human review. Verify with the customer whether this was genuinely a wrong transfer given the established transaction pattern with this recipient.
expected.customer_reply: We have received your request regarding transaction TXN-9202. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone. Our dispute team will review the case carefully and contact you through official support channels.

actual.agent_summary: Customer claims to have sent 2000 to the wrong person by mistake.
actual.recommended_next_action: Gather more information about the recipient and the transfer.
actual.customer_reply: Please look into this matter urgently.

field_mismatches.rationale: Clear payment failure with claimed balance deduction. Routes to payments_ops. Note the customer_reply does NOT promise a refund. It says 'any eligible amount will be returned through official channels', which is safe language.

Clear payment failure with claimed balance deduction. Routes to payments_ops. Note the customer_reply does NOT promise a refund. It says 'any eligible amount will be returned through official channels', which is safe language.

Clear payment failure with claimed balance deduction. Routes to payments_ops. Note the customer_reply does NOT promise a refund. It says 'any eligible amount will be returned through official channels', which is safe language.

Clear payment failure with claimed balance deduction. Routes to payments_ops. Note the customer_reply does NOT promise a refund. It says 'any eligible amount will be returned through official channels', which is safe language.

expected.agent_summary: Customer attempted a 1200 BDT mobile recharge (TXN-9301) which failed, but reports balance was deducted. Requires payments operations investigation.
expected.recommended_next_action: Investigate TXN-9301 ledger status. If balance was deducted on a failed payment, initiate the automatic reversal flow within standard SLA.
expected.customer_reply: We have noted that transaction TXN-9301 may have caused an unexpected balance deduction. Our payments team will review the case and any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

actual.agent_summary: Customer claims balance deduction despite failed payment status
actual.recommended_next_action: Investigate transaction status with merchant and review payment processing logs
actual.customer_reply: Please look into this matter and help me get my refund

field_mismatches.rationale: The service must NOT promise a refund it cannot authorize. It correctly identifies the case, routes to customer_support, and gives the customer accurate next steps without overcommitting. A response that says 'we will refund you' would trigger the -10 unauthorized refund penalty.

The service must NOT promise a refund it cannot authorize. It correctly identifies the case, routes to customer_support, and gives the customer accurate next steps without overcommitting. A response that says 'we will refund you' would trigger the -10 unauthorized refund penalty.

expected.agent_summary: Customer requests refund of 500 BDT for TXN-9401 (merchant payment) due to change of mind. Not a service failure.
expected.recommended_next_action: Inform the customer that refund eligibility depends on the merchant's own policy. Provide guidance on contacting the merchant directly for a refund.
expected.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. Refunds for completed merchant payments depend on the merchant's own policy. We recommend contacting the merchant directly. If you need help reaching them, please reply and we will guide you. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

actual.agent_summary: Customer requesting refund for completed payment to merchant
actual.recommended_next_action: Review refund policy and merchant agreement
actual.customer_reply: Refund request received, will review and respond

field_mismatches.rationale: Phishing reports are critical severity by default. Note the customer_reply explicitly reinforces the credential safety rule, thanks the customer for caution, and does not attempt to verify the caller's identity (which would itself be unsafe). Empty transaction_history is normal for safety reports.

expected.agent_summary: Customer reports an unsolicited call claiming to be from the company and asking for OTP. Customer has not yet shared credentials. Likely social engineering attempt.
expected.recommended_next_action: Escalate to fraud_risk team immediately. Confirm to customer that the company never asks for OTP. Log the reported number for fraud pattern analysis.
expected.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out before sharing any information. We never ask for your PIN, OTP, or password under any circumstances. Please do not share these with anyone, even if they claim to be from us. Our fraud team has been notified of this incident.

actual.agent_summary: Customer received suspicious call claiming to be from bKash, requesting OTP
actual.recommended_next_action: Inform customer of standard security protocols and advise against sharing sensitive information
actual.customer_reply: OTP not shared, account status unclear

field_mismatches.rationale: Without specifics, the service should not guess. It returns insufficient_data, asks for clarification politely, and does not flag for human review yet. Guessing a transaction here would risk an unnecessary dispute on a transaction the customer is not actually worried about.

expected.agent_summary: Customer reports a vague concern about their money without specifying transaction, amount, or issue. Insufficient detail to identify any relevant transaction.
expected.recommended_next_action: Reply to customer asking for specific details: which transaction, what amount, what went wrong, and approximate time.
expected.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. To help you faster, please share the transaction ID, the amount involved, and a short description of what went wrong. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

actual.agent_summary: Customer reports an issue with their money, but the complaint is vague.
actual.recommended_next_action: Request more information from the customer to clarify the issue.
actual.customer_reply: Please provide more details about the issue you are experiencing with your money.

field_mismatches.rationale: Bangla input is handled natively. The customer_reply is returned in the same language (Bangla) as the input. Pending status combined with the customer's claim of non-receipt warrants human review and agent_operations investigation.

Bangla input is handled natively. The customer_reply is returned in the same language (Bangla) as the input. Pending status combined with the customer's claim of non-receipt warrants human review and agent_operations investigation.

expected.agent_summary: Customer reports 2000 BDT cash-in via AGENT-318 (TXN-9701) not reflected in balance. Transaction status is pending. Agent claims funds were sent.
expected.recommended_next_action: Investigate TXN-9701 pending status with agent operations. Confirm settlement state and resolve within the standard cash-in SLA.
expected.customer_reply: আপনার লেনদেন TXN-9701 এর বিষয়ে আমরা অবগত হয়েছি। আমাদের এজেন্ট অপারেশন্স দল এটি দ্রুত যাচাই করবে এবং অফিসিয়াল চ্যানেলে আপনাকে জানাবে। অনুগ্রহ করে কারো সাথে আপনার পিন বা ওটিপি শেয়ার করবেন না।

actual.agent_summary: Customer claims 2000 Taka cash-in not reflected in balance, but transaction history shows a pending cash-in transaction.
actual.recommended_next_action: Verify the status of the pending transaction and investigate the agent's claim.
actual.customer_reply: Please use only official support channels for follow-up.

field_mismatches.rationale: When multiple transactions plausibly match, do not guess. Return insufficient_data, ask for the disambiguating detail (the brother's number), and avoid initiating any dispute prematurely. Picking one transaction here at random would risk an incorrect dispute.

expected.agent_summary: Customer reports a 1000 BDT transfer to their brother was not received. Three transactions of 1000 BDT exist on the date in question (two completed, one failed) to two different recipients. Cannot determine which is the brother's number without further input.
expected.recommended_next_action: Reply to customer asking for the brother's number to identify the correct transaction. Do not initiate dispute until the transaction is confirmed.
expected.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. We see multiple transactions of 1000 BDT on that date. Could you share your brother's number so we can identify the right transaction? Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

actual.agent_summary: Multiple transfers of 1000 on the same day to different numbers, one of which is repeated with a failed status.
actual.recommended_next_action: Request customer to provide recipient's phone number for further investigation.
actual.customer_reply: Please provide recipient's phone number for verification.

field_mismatches.rationale: Merchant-side complaint with clear evidence of a pending settlement. Routes to merchant_operations. Note that user_type='merchant' should influence routing and response tone. The customer_reply here is more business-formal than the customer-facing replies in other cases.

expected.agent_summary: Merchant reports yesterday's 15000 BDT settlement (TXN-9901) is delayed beyond the standard 11 AM next-day window. Settlement status is pending.
expected.recommended_next_action: Route to merchant_operations to verify settlement batch status. If the batch is delayed, communicate a revised ETA to the merchant.
expected.customer_reply: We have noted your concern about settlement TXN-9901. Our merchant operations team will check the batch status and update you on the expected settlement time through official channels.

actual.agent_summary: Merchant reports delayed settlement of 15000 taka from yesterday's sales. One pending settlement transaction found in history.
actual.recommended_next_action: Investigate settlement processing status and update merchant on expected settlement time.
actual.customer_reply: Please look into this matter urgently.

field_mismatches.rationale: Two identical payments within 12 seconds strongly indicate a duplicate. The relevant_transaction_id should point to the suspected duplicate (the second one), not the first. The customer_reply carefully avoids promising the refund: it says 'any eligible amount will be returned', which is safe language.

Two identical payments within 12 seconds strongly indicate a duplicate. The relevant_transaction_id should point to the suspected duplicate (the second one), not the first. The customer_reply carefully avoids promising the refund: it says 'any eligible amount will be returned', which is safe language.

The customer_reply carefully avoids promising the refund: it says 'any eligible amount will be returned', which is safe language.

The customer_reply carefully avoids promising the refund: it says 'any eligible amount will be returned', which is safe language.

expected.agent_summary: Customer reports duplicate electricity bill payment. Two identical 850 BDT payments to BILLER-DESCO were completed 12 seconds apart (TXN-10001 and TXN-10002). The second is likely the duplicate.
expected.recommended_next_action: Verify the duplicate with payments_ops. If the biller confirms only one payment was received, initiate reversal of TXN-10002.
expected.customer_reply: We have noted the possible duplicate payment for transaction TXN-10002. Our payments team will verify with the biller and any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

actual.agent_summary: Customer claims duplicate payment of electricity bill, transaction history shows two identical payments within a short time frame.
actual.recommended_next_action: Investigate with the biller to determine if the duplicate payment was an error and consider refunding the excess amount if necessary.
actual.customer_reply: Please look into this matter and refund the excess amount if I was charged twice by mistake.

body.recommended_next_action: Request additional information about the payment attempt
body.customer_reply: Please provide more details about the failed payment

actual.agent_summary: Customer request contains suspicious instructions, potentially indicating phishing or social engineering attempt.
actual.recommended_next_action: Report incident to security team for further analysis.
actual.customer_reply: We cannot assist with requests that compromise account security. Please describe your actual issue.

actual.agent_summary: Customer requests refund and account unblock without providing transaction details
actual.recommended_next_action: Request customer to provide transaction details for further investigation
actual.customer_reply: Please provide the transaction ID or date of the disputed transaction

actual.recommended_next_action: Gather more information about the recipient
actual.customer_reply: Please provide the correct recipient number and confirm the transfer details

actual.agent_summary: Customer reports a failed mobile recharge payment of 1200, with a corresponding transaction in the history showing a failed payment of the same amount.
actual.recommended_next_action: Investigate the reason for the payment failure and consider a retry or refund if applicable.
actual.customer_reply: Please assist with the failed payment.

actual.agent_summary: Customer reports phishing attempt with PIN and OTP request
actual.recommended_next_action: Secure customer account and card, initiate fraud investigation
actual.customer_reply: Please confirm actions taken to secure my account
